title: minuartia recurva var. bigerrensis
intro: Minuartia recurva var. bigerrensis, also known as Alpine Candytuft, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Alpine Candytuft can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
